productDisplayName: Puma Men Silly Point White & Red Sports Shoes
description: Silly Point shoes from puma have tiny little rubber spikes on the outsole. These shoes are great for training and can double up as everyday wear as well. A silhouette that fits perfectly on your feet, comfort is guaranteed throughout the day.UpperSynthetic leather upper with stitch detailing for added structureCentral lacing for a customised, comfortable FitPadded collar and tongue for snug fitBrand appliquéd on the tongue for styleSynthetic formstripe on the sidesSoft, cushioned footbedMidsoleFull length midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with tiny rubber lugs for durability and stabilitySuction points below the forefoot for great tractionOutsole extended and embedded onto the upper for added protectionshoe careRub surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
